title: Hypers Discs
description: a small tweak to the music discs while still keeping the vanilla feel!
body:
#

a simplistic yet needed change to the vanilla music discs (and some modded) that in my opinion, improves them tenfold (totally not biased :3), join the discord linked on this page to sugest mod compat btw lol

# ![discs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/588d9ecd3ad719fab974e35ab881a688cea28c1b.png)

Mod Compat ![mod compat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4901aaece606c3fb741173a312d64464ef2d0037.png) ##

Compatible Mods

**

Enderscape: https://modrinth.com/mod/enderscape

** **

Trailier Tales: https://modrinth.com/mod/trailier-tales** **

Oreganised: https://modrinth.com/mod/oreganized** **

Alex's Mobs: https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs** **

Alex's Caves: https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves** **

Nirvana: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nirvana**

#

Before You Ask

**

Q: Can i use this project in my published modpacks?

**

A: of course, you can do this with any of my projects aslong as the download stays hosted within the modrinth ecosystem :3
